wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Empindu artisan marketplace project overview. Explain the platform's mission to connect traditional Ugandan craftspeople with conscious consumers while preserving cultural heritage. Document the full-stack architecture combining Django backend with Next.js frontend, including the bot layer with Telegram integration and AI capabilities. Describe the key value propositions for buyers, artisans, and platform operations. Include technology stack summary, deployment strategy, and business impact metrics. Provide context on the artisan economy, cultural preservation goals, and sustainable commerce model. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and include practical examples of the platform's unique features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Backend Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive backend architecture documentation for Empindu's Django-based system. Describe the modular Django app structure with artisans, products, orders, gifting, and supporting apps. Document the Django Ninja API organization, URL routing patterns, and middleware stack. Explain the authentication and authorization mechanisms, including role-based access control for admins, artisans, and customers. Detail the database design patterns, model relationships, and data persistence strategies. Include the event-driven architecture with Celery workers for background tasks, asynchronous processing patterns, and task queue management. Document the configuration management across development and production environments, including environment variables and secrets management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Model Design
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Product model design and architecture. Detail the story-first product philosophy that prioritizes artisan narratives and cultural provenance over traditional e-commerce product descriptions. Document all model fields including identity attributes (slug, name, Luganda translations), story elements (primary and draft stories with multilingual support), craft details (material, technique, production time), pricing structure with revenue sharing (artisan, heritage fund, platform splits), inventory management, customisation options, and shipping specifications. Explain the embedding field for semantic search integration and the provenance record relationship. Include field validation rules, constraints, and business logic implementations like artisan earnings calculation and heritage fund contributions.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Onboarding Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the artisan onboarding workflow. Document the complete journey from initial contact via WhatsApp/Telegram through verification and profile completion. Explain the zero-cost onboarding mechanism that allows artisans to join without upfront fees. Detail the multi-channel onboarding process including web forms, WhatsApp integration, Telegram bot interactions, and field officer onboarding. Include the business registration process, identity verification steps, and profile setup workflow. Document the integration with external services like mobile money for verification and the automated onboarding pipeline. Address common onboarding issues, verification failures, and support workflows for artisans during the registration process.

wiki_catalogs.name: Personalized Gifting
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the personalized gifting feature covering individual gift purchase workflow. Document the gift selection process, personalization options including occasion types, recipient information, and custom messages. Explain the gift wrapping options, scheduling capabilities for future deliveries, and gift order management interface. Detail the gift modal component implementation, user interface patterns for gift customization, and order tracking functionality. Include gift-specific data models, validation rules, and business logic for gift personalization. Address gift order states, delivery scheduling, and recipient management features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Providers
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the payment provider integration system. Detail the Stripe credit/debit card payment provider configuration, MTN MoMo mobile money integration, and TON cryptocurrency support. Document the provider abstraction layer that standardizes payment processing across different methods. Explain provider-specific configurations, API keys management, and webhook handling. Include provider selection logic, fallback mechanisms, and provider-specific error handling. Document the payment provider dashboard for monitoring transaction volumes, success rates, and provider performance metrics. Address provider-specific compliance requirements, transaction limits, and regional restrictions.

wiki_catalogs.name: Core Entities
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for Empindu's core business entities including Artisan, Product, and Order models. Detail the complete field definitions, data types, relationships, and constraints for each entity. Document the artisan identity system with user relationships, craft tradition associations, and certification tracking. Explain the story-first product architecture with provenance records, embedding vectors, and multilingual support. Cover the complete order lifecycle with payment states, fulfillment tracking, and return processing. Include entity relationship diagrams showing foreign key relationships, indexing strategies, and performance optimizations. Address data validation rules, business constraints, and referential integrity measures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Order Lifecycle Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the order lifecycle management system. Document the complete 8-state order workflow from pending_payment through refunded, including state transitions, business rules, and validation logic. Explain the frozen financial snapshot mechanism, timestamp tracking, and audit trail capabilities. Detail the order status enumeration, payout status tracking, and integration with external shipping providers. Include state machine implementation, transition triggers, and conditional logic for each state change. Address order timeline visualization, status notifications, and user interface components for order tracking.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Management Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for artisan management endpoints. Document all CRUD operations for artisan profiles including onboarding workflows, verification processes, and profile updates. Detail authentication requirements, request/response schemas for artisan registration, profile editing, and certification management. Include endpoint patterns for artisan search, filtering by craft traditions, and geographic location-based queries. Document image upload endpoints, verification document submission, and status tracking. Provide examples for common artisan onboarding scenarios, bulk operations, and administrative management functions. Address rate limiting, validation rules, and error handling specific to artisan data.

wiki_catalogs.name: Analytics Dashboard
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Analytics Dashboard component. Document the real-time platform statistics display including artisan counts, product availability, buyer metrics, and verification rates. Explain the data visualization components including bar charts for product distribution by category and pie charts for category breakdown. Detail the animated card layouts, responsive design patterns, and interactive chart components using Recharts. Include the PlatformStats interface, data fetching mechanisms, and performance optimizations. Document the color schemes, iconography, and visual hierarchy used for effective data presentation. Address loading states, empty data handling, and accessibility considerations for the dashboard interface.

wiki_catalogs.name: Bot Webhook Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Telegram bot webhook configuration and setup. Document the webhook URL endpoints, security token configuration, and SSL certificate requirements. Explain the webhook payload structure, message parsing mechanisms, and response handling patterns. Detail the integration with Supabase functions for payment processing and order confirmation workflows. Include webhook verification methods, rate limiting considerations, and error handling strategies. Document the webhook routing logic, message filtering, and priority handling for different conversation types. Address webhook testing procedures, local development setup, and production deployment considerations. Provide troubleshooting guides for common webhook configuration issues and connectivity problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Voice Transcription & Audio Processing
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the voice transcription system powered by OpenAI Whisper. Detail the audio processing pipeline for transcribing artisan biographies, product descriptions, and customer reviews. Document the serverless function architecture for audio file handling, transcription workflows, and multilingual support. Explain the integration with Supabase storage, audio format requirements, and quality optimization techniques. Include examples of supported languages, transcription accuracy metrics, and fallback mechanisms for poor audio quality. Address privacy considerations for audio data handling and compliance with data protection regulations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Component Hierarchy & Design System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for Empindu's component hierarchy and design system. Detail the component organization structure, custom UI component library built with shadcn/ui, and design system patterns. Document the component composition patterns, prop interfaces, and styling conventions. Explain the responsive design implementation, accessibility features, and theme customization options. Include component usage examples, best practices for extending the design system, and guidelines for maintaining consistency across the application. Address the integration with Tailwind CSS, component state management, and reusability patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Meilisearch Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Meilisearch integration used for full-text search functionality. Document the search indexing strategy, query processing, and result ranking algorithms. Explain the integration with the marketplace page, including search parameter handling, faceted filtering, and search result presentation. Detail the search API endpoints, query syntax, and performance optimization techniques. Include configuration options, search analytics tracking, and troubleshooting common search issues. Document the relationship between frontend search components and backend Meilisearch indexing processes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Django App Structure
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Empindu's Django app architecture. Explain the modular design with specialized apps for artisans, products, orders, gifting, heritage, machine learning, search, notifications, payments, media, and telegram bot. Document the app initialization patterns, model relationships, and inter-app dependencies. Detail how each app encapsulates specific business domains while maintaining clean separation of concerns. Include the app registry configuration, custom management commands, and app-specific admin interfaces. Explain the rationale behind the modular architecture and how it supports scalability and maintainability.

wiki_catalogs.name: Stripe Credit/Debit Card Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Stripe payment provider integration. Document the Stripe checkout session creation, payment confirmation flow, and webhook handling for card payments. Explain Stripe API key configuration, webhook secret management, and security considerations. Detail the payment intent creation process, card validation, and error handling for declined cards. Include Stripe dashboard configuration, test mode setup, and production deployment requirements. Document the integration with Supabase for payment record storage and order status updates. Address PCI compliance requirements, 3D Secure implementation, and fraud prevention measures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Database Design
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive database design documentation for Empindu's PostgreSQL schema. Detail the entity relationship design including artisans, products, orders, reviews, and corporate gifting tables. Document the primary keys, foreign key relationships, and referential integrity constraints. Explain the use of UUIDs as primary keys, timestamp fields for audit trails, and the unique constraints for business rules. Cover the database security model including Row Level Security policies for user access control. Document the schema evolution strategy through migration files and version management. Include table creation scripts, index strategies, and performance optimization techniques. Address data validation rules, check constraints, and business logic enforcement at the database level.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Model
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for the Artisan entity. Detail the complete field definitions including identity fields (user relationship, slug, craft_tradition), biographical information (bio, multilingual support), location data (community, district), contact information (phone, momo_number, airtel_number, telegram_chat_id), certification tracking, and media assets. Document the artisan onboarding workflow through different channels (web, whatsapp, telegram, field). Explain the relationship with User model, CraftTradition model, and Certification model. Include the artisan analytics properties (total_earnings_ugx, order_count) and utility methods. Address the multilingual content support with Luganda and Swahili translations. Document the automatic slug generation, artisan status tracking, and the cultural IP anchoring through craft tradition association.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for Empindu development setup. Include detailed prerequisites (Python 3.11+, Node.js 20+, Docker Desktop), step-by-step local development environment configuration, and environment variable setup for both backend and frontend. Document the complete development workflow from cloning the repository through running migrations and starting development servers. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common setup issues, port conflicts, and dependency problems. Include verification steps to ensure proper installation and explain access points for frontend, backend API, Django admin, and Meilisearch. Address both Windows and Unix-like system configurations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Frontend Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed frontend architecture documentation for Empindu's Next.js/React application. Describe the component hierarchy, page-based routing system, and state management architecture using React Query and Zustand. Document the Supabase integration patterns, authentication flow, and real-time data synchronization. Explain the UI component library organization, custom hooks ecosystem, and reusable component patterns. Detail the build system configuration, TypeScript integration, and development workflow. Include the styling architecture with Tailwind CSS, responsive design patterns, and accessibility considerations. Document the integration with external services, error handling strategies, and performance optimization techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Media Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for product media handling and image management system. Explain the ProductPhoto model architecture with support for multiple images per product, hero image designation, captioning, and sorting mechanisms. Document the Cloudinary integration for image storage, optimization, and CDN delivery. Detail the image upload workflow, validation rules, and responsive image generation. Cover the product card component implementation showing hero image display, fallback mechanisms, and lazy loading strategies. Include media optimization techniques, accessibility considerations for product images, and performance best practices for large product catalogs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Profile Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for artisan profile management functionality. Detail the artisan model architecture including identity fields, craft tradition associations, certifications, and biographical information. Document the multilingual bio system supporting English, Luganda, and Swahili languages. Explain the voice note biography transcription process using OpenAI Whisper and the review workflow for published bios. Cover profile photo and cover photo management, location data (community and district), and contact information including WhatsApp, Telegram, and mobile money numbers. Document the artisan dashboard features, earnings tracking, order statistics, and mobile money payout automation. Include profile editing workflows, verification status management, and quality assurance measures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Corporate Gifting
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the corporate gifting system covering bulk gift ordering and business-to-business functionality. Document the corporate gifting portal interface, bulk order creation, and team gift management. Explain the gift order aggregation process, payment handling for corporate accounts, and approval workflows. Detail the corporate gifting manager admin interface, order status management, and reporting capabilities. Include corporate gift templates, bulk customization options, and departmental ordering features. Address corporate account management, order volume discounts, seasonal corporate collections, and integration with business procurement systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Workflows
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for payment processing workflows and state management. Document the complete payment lifecycle from initiation to completion, including pending, authorized, captured, and failed states. Explain the cash on delivery workflow, mobile money callback processing, and email confirmation sequences. Detail the transaction reference generation, payment validation logic, and order status synchronization. Include payment retry mechanisms, timeout handling, and cancellation procedures. Document the payment analytics tracking, fraud detection integration, and suspicious activity monitoring. Address payment reconciliation processes, settlement timing, and dispute resolution workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Craft Tradition & Certification
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed data model documentation for CraftTradition and Certification entities. Document the cultural IP anchor system including craft tradition documentation with ethnic group and regional classifications. Explain the heritage fund levy structure and GI (Geographical Indication) status tracking. Detail the certification system with quality assurance requirements, active status management, and artisan certification relationships. Include the multilingual support implementation for craft names and descriptions. Document the data validation rules, business constraints for cultural preservation, and administrative approval workflows. Address the relationship between craft traditions and artisan onboarding processes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Checkout Process
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the checkout process implementation. Detail the step-by-step checkout flow from cart review through payment confirmation, including form validation, shipping address collection, and order creation. Document the integration between frontend cart store and backend order API, including real-time validation and error handling. Explain the checkout UI components, user experience flow, and state management during the purchasing process. Include payment method selection, shipping calculation, and order confirmation mechanisms.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Catalog Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for product catalog endpoints. Document product listing, search, and discovery endpoints with filtering by craft categories, artisan, price ranges, and provenance. Detail product creation, editing, and deletion workflows including story-first content management and media handling. Document inventory management endpoints, pricing updates, and availability status. Include search endpoints with full-text search, vector similarity search, and multi-language support. Provide examples for product browsing, advanced filtering, sorting options, and pagination. Address product validation, image upload handling, and SEO-friendly URL generation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Users Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Users Management system. Document the user administration interface including user listing, profile viewing, and account status management. Explain user role assignments, permission controls, and account verification workflows. Detail the user search and filtering capabilities, bulk actions, and audit trail functionality. Include the integration with authentication systems, user activity monitoring, and security measures. Document the user interface patterns for managing different user types including buyers, artisans, and administrators. Address user data protection, privacy controls, and compliance considerations in the management interface.

wiki_catalogs.name: Customer Service Automation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the customer service automation system integrated with Telegram. Detail the automated response workflows, conversation starters, and FAQ handling mechanisms. Document the integration with the notification system for order updates, payment confirmations, and shipping notifications. Explain the multilingual support implementation, message templating system, and dynamic content generation. Include the automated ticketing system for customer inquiries, escalation workflows, and human agent handoff procedures. Document the integration with product catalogs, order history, and artisan profiles for contextual responses. Address the conversation flow design, intent recognition patterns, and response personalization features. Provide guidelines for customizing automated responses and managing conversation contexts.

wiki_catalogs.name: Semantic Search & Vector Embeddings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the semantic search implementation using pgvector embeddings. Explain the vector embedding generation pipeline for products, artisans, and content. Document the database schema modifications for vector storage, embedding dimensions, and similarity search algorithms. Detail the integration with PostgreSQL's vector operations, query optimization techniques, and performance tuning strategies. Include examples of embedding generation, similarity scoring, and hybrid search combining vector and keyword matching. Address embedding refresh workflows, batch processing capabilities, and maintaining embedding consistency across content updates.

wiki_catalogs.name: State Management Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for Empindu's state management architecture. Explain the dual approach combining React Query for server state and Zustand for client-side state. Document the cart store implementation, authentication state management, and data fetching patterns. Detail the custom hooks ecosystem including useAuth, useProducts, usePlatformStats, and useToast. Explain state synchronization strategies, optimistic updates, and cache invalidation patterns. Include examples of state mutations, subscription patterns, and integration with React Query's caching mechanisms. Address performance considerations, state persistence, and debugging techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Semantic Search Implementation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the semantic search system powered by pgvector embeddings. Detail the vector embedding generation process for product descriptions, artisan stories, and craft traditions. Explain the similarity search algorithms, embedding dimensions, and search threshold configurations. Document the database schema changes for vector storage, indexing strategies, and query optimization. Include examples of semantic search queries, result ranking based on contextual relevance, and performance tuning for large-scale embeddings. Address embedding maintenance, periodic reindexing, and vector search best practices.

wiki_catalogs.name: API Design & Routing
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API design documentation for Empindu's Django Ninja REST API. Document the versioned API structure with v1 namespace, URL routing patterns, and endpoint organization. Explain the resource-based routing for artisans, products, orders, and gifting systems. Detail the request/response schemas, authentication requirements, and error handling patterns. Include the API documentation standards, endpoint categorization, and rate limiting strategies. Document the integration patterns with frontend applications and external services. Provide examples of common API usage patterns and best practices for extending the API surface.

wiki_catalogs.name: MTN MoMo Mobile Money Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the MTN MoMo mobile money payment provider integration. Detail the MoMo API configuration, transaction initiation process, and callback handling for mobile money payments. Document the phone number validation, transaction reference generation, and payment status polling mechanism. Explain the webhook setup for payment completion notifications and failed transaction handling. Include regional restrictions, currency handling, and mobile money operator-specific requirements. Document the integration with Supabase for payment tracking and order fulfillment. Address security considerations, transaction limits, and customer support workflows for mobile money payments.

wiki_catalogs.name: Vector Search System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for Empindu's vector search implementation using pgvector. Explain the embedding generation process for product descriptions, artisan stories, and search queries. Document the vector dimension configuration, similarity algorithms (cosine distance, inner product), and search threshold tuning. Detail the trigger-based embedding updates, batch processing for existing data, and real-time embedding generation during content creation. Cover the integration with Meilisearch for hybrid search combining vector similarity with traditional text search. Include query optimization techniques, index maintenance strategies, and performance monitoring. Document the recommendation engine architecture, collaborative filtering patterns, and personalized search ranking. Address embedding quality metrics, A/B testing of search algorithms, and continuous improvement strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Craft Tradition Model
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the CraftTradition model that serves as the cultural IP anchor of Empindu. Document the field definitions including name, ethnic_group, region, description, and GI (Geographic Indication) status tracking. Explain the heritage fund levy percentage system and its role in cultural preservation funding. Detail the multilingual naming support with Luganda translations. Document the ordering mechanism and the relationship with Artisan models through the many-to-one relationship. Include the cultural significance of craft traditions, their documentation requirements, and the protection mechanisms through GI registration. Address the regional and ethnic group categorization system used for heritage preservation and market positioning.

wiki_catalogs.name: Architecture Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create architectural documentation for Empindu's full-stack system design. Describe the high-level architecture combining Django backend with Next.js frontend, including the monorepo structure and service boundaries. Document component interactions between frontend React application, Django API layer, PostgreSQL database with pgvector, Redis cache, Meilisearch search, and external services (Stripe, Cloudinary, Telegram). Explain the event-driven architecture with Celery workers, the modular Django app structure, and the bot layer integration. Include system context diagrams showing data flows, integration patterns, and technology stack rationale. Address scalability considerations, deployment topology, and cross-cutting concerns like authentication, caching, and search optimization.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Architecture
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data architecture documentation for Empindu's data management system. Describe the PostgreSQL database design with pgvector extensions for semantic search, vector embedding strategies, and search index optimization. Document the data migration strategy, schema evolution patterns, and database relationship design. Explain the Supabase serverless functions architecture, trigger-based data processing, and real-time data synchronization. Detail the data access patterns, caching strategies with Redis, and search optimization using Meilisearch. Include data security measures, backup strategies, and data lifecycle management. Document the integration between frontend state management and backend data services, including conflict resolution and offline synchronization patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Provenance Records & Cultural IP
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the provenance record system that establishes immutable cultural IP anchors for each product. Explain the ProvenanceRecord model design that captures artisan identity, community attribution, craft tradition details, material sourcing, and geographic origins at listing time. Document the snapshot mechanism that freezes cultural attribution when products are listed, ensuring permanent cultural recognition. Detail the blockchain hash field for future implementation, the relationship to the main Product model, and the cultural preservation implications. Include the legal and ethical considerations of cultural IP anchoring, attribution requirements, and the platform's commitment to fair cultural representation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Craft Traditions & Certifications
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for craft traditions and certification systems. Document the CraftTradition model including cultural heritage documentation, ethnic group associations, regional classifications, and GI (Geographical Indication) status tracking. Explain the Certification model for Empindu Certified marks, including requirement specifications and quality assurance processes. Detail the relationship between artisans and craft traditions, certification enrollment workflows, and the heritage fund levy system. Document the cultural IP anchoring mechanism that preserves Ugandan craft traditions while enabling commercial activity. Include the impact on product listings, artisan visibility, and marketplace trust indicators. Address certification renewal processes, quality audits, and the role of craft traditions in product storytelling.

wiki_catalogs.name: Gift Order Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the complete gift order lifecycle and workflow management. Document the gift order states from draft through completion, including payment processing and fulfillment stages. Explain the gift order timeline component showing order progression, automated status updates, and notification triggers. Detail the gift confirmation system integration with email/SMS notifications, order tracking mechanisms, and delivery coordination. Include gift-specific return and cancellation policies, order modification capabilities, and customer service workflows. Address gift order analytics, reporting dashboards, and performance metrics for gift commerce operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Security & Compliance
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for payment security measures and regulatory compliance. Document PCI DSS compliance requirements, data encryption for payment information, and secure tokenization of sensitive data. Explain fraud prevention mechanisms, risk assessment algorithms, and suspicious transaction detection. Detail the implementation of SSL/TLS encryption, secure API endpoints, and authenticated payment requests. Document compliance with local regulations for mobile money transactions, cryptocurrency regulations, and cross-border payments. Include audit logging for payment activities, data retention policies, and security incident response procedures. Address GDPR compliance for customer data protection and payment information handling.

wiki_catalogs.name: Gifting & Heritage Fund
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for the gifting system and heritage fund ledger. Detail the gift order structure including personalization options, corporate gift management, and scheduling systems. Document the heritage fund accounting with automated 3% levy calculations, fund allocation tracking, and cultural preservation contributions. Explain the gift order timeline implementation, recipient management, and delivery coordination. Include the financial ledger design for heritage fund transactions, audit trails, and reporting mechanisms. Address the integration between gifting orders and order processing workflows, tax implications, and compliance requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for payment integration systems within the order processing workflow. Document the supported payment methods (Stripe, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, TON Crypto), payment reference handling, and transaction validation. Explain the integration with Supabase functions for payment processing, webhook handling, and payment status updates. Detail the payment method choices, payment reference generation, and automated payment confirmation workflows. Include error handling for failed payments, retry mechanisms, and payment dispute resolution processes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Order Processing Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for order processing endpoints. Document complete order lifecycle including cart management, checkout workflows, payment processing, and fulfillment tracking. Detail order creation, modification, cancellation, and return/refund processes. Document order status transitions, state machine handling, and audit trail endpoints. Include payment confirmation endpoints, shipping management, and delivery tracking. Provide examples for multi-item orders, customizations, and international shipping scenarios. Address order validation, inventory checks, fraud prevention, and error handling throughout the order lifecycle.

wiki_catalogs.name: Orders Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Orders Management interface. Document the order listing system, status tracking, and fulfillment workflows. Explain the order state management, payment verification processes, and shipping coordination tools. Detail the order modification capabilities, cancellation procedures, and refund processing workflows. Include the integration with payment systems, inventory updates, and notification systems. Document the order analytics, performance metrics, and reporting features. Address order search and filtering, bulk operations, and customer service integration patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Onboarding Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the artisan onboarding workflow through Telegram bot. Document the step-by-step registration process, identity verification procedures, and craft tradition documentation. Explain the bot's role in collecting artisan information, uploading documents, and verifying credentials. Detail the integration with Django authentication for creating artisan accounts and profile management. Include the automated onboarding checklist, document validation processes, and approval workflow notifications. Document the artisan's interaction patterns, common questions during onboarding, and automated guidance systems. Address the integration with the business registration system, artisan analytics dashboard, and profile completion tracking. Provide troubleshooting guides for onboarding issues and manual intervention procedures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Recommendation Engine
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the AI-powered recommendation system. Document the collaborative filtering algorithms, content-based filtering, and hybrid recommendation approaches used to suggest products to users. Explain the user preference modeling, item similarity calculations, and real-time personalization workflows. Detail the integration with user interaction tracking, recommendation caching strategies, and A/B testing capabilities. Include examples of recommendation triggers, algorithm performance metrics, and user feedback incorporation. Address cold start problems for new users and items, recommendation diversity strategies, and performance optimization for large-scale recommendation serving.

wiki_catalogs.name: Routing & Navigation System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Empindu's Next.js routing and navigation system. Document the page-based routing architecture, dynamic routes, and navigation patterns. Explain the client-side navigation implementation, route protection mechanisms, and authentication-aware routing. Detail the custom NavLink component, active state management, and navigation accessibility features. Include examples of programmatic navigation, route parameters handling, and query string management. Address SEO considerations, meta tags management, and progressive enhancement patterns. Document the integration with Supabase authentication and user role-based navigation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Multi-Language Search Support
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the multi-language search functionality supporting English, Luganda, and Swahili content. Document language detection mechanisms, translation preprocessing, and localized search result ranking. Explain the implementation of language-specific tokenization, stemming, and normalization rules. Detail the content localization strategy, multilingual product metadata, and search interface localization. Include configuration for language switching, locale-specific search preferences, and cultural relevance adjustments. Address challenges in cross-lingual search, transliteration support, and maintaining search quality across different languages.

wiki_catalogs.name: Database Models & Relationships
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed data model documentation for Empindu's Django ORM models. Document the entity-relationship patterns between artisans, products, orders, and gifting systems. Explain the model inheritance hierarchies, field definitions, and data validation rules. Detail the foreign key relationships, many-to-many associations, and reverse relationships. Include the model manager patterns, custom query methods, and optimization strategies. Document the database indexing strategies, performance considerations, and query optimization techniques. Explain the data migration patterns and model evolution strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: TON Cryptocurrency Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the TON (The Open Network) cryptocurrency payment provider integration. Document the TON wallet integration, smart contract interactions, and crypto payment processing workflow. Explain TON blockchain transaction handling, wallet connectivity, and payment verification processes. Detail the integration with TON DNS resolution, wallet address validation, and transaction monitoring. Include crypto payment routing, exchange rate handling, and volatility management strategies. Document the security considerations for crypto payments, private key management, and wallet backup procedures. Address regulatory compliance, tax reporting requirements, and crypto-specific error handling patterns.

wiki_catalogs.name: Serverless Functions
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for Supabase Edge Functions architecture in Empindu. Detail the function deployment strategy, runtime environment configuration, and dependency management. Document the payment processing functions including cash payment validation, mobile money integration with MTN MoMo, and cryptocurrency transaction handling. Explain the email notification system for order confirmations, gift orders, and administrative alerts. Cover function security patterns, environment variable management, and error handling strategies. Detail the integration with external APIs, webhook processing, and real-time data synchronization. Include function monitoring, logging strategies, and performance optimization techniques. Document the CI/CD pipeline for function deployment, rollback procedures, and testing methodologies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Certification Model
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Certification model that manages Empindu Certified quality assurance program. Detail the certification field structure including name, description, and requirements stored as JSON. Document the active status tracking and the many-to-many relationship with Artisan models. Explain the certification requirements system and how it enables quality assurance and authenticity validation. Include the certification lifecycle from creation to activation/deactivation. Address how certifications enhance artisan credibility and product trust in the marketplace. Document the relationship with artisan certification tracking and the role certifications play in the overall quality ecosystem.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the artisan management system. Detail the complete artisan onboarding workflow from initial contact via WhatsApp/Telegram through verification and profile completion. Document the artisan model architecture including craft traditions, certifications, and professional profiles. Explain the business registration process, profile management features, and artisan analytics dashboard. Include the zero-cost onboarding mechanism, voice note biography transcription using OpenAI Whisper, and direct pricing power features. Document the artisan dashboard functionality, earnings tracking, and mobile money payout automation. Address verification processes, quality assurance measures, and artisan support workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Integration Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed integration patterns documentation for Empindu's multi-service architecture. Describe the containerization strategy using Docker Compose, service orchestration, and inter-service communication patterns. Document the external service integrations including Stripe payment processing, Cloudinary media management, Telegram/WhatsApp customer service, and OpenAI Whisper for voice transcription. Explain the webhook architectures, real-time event processing, and asynchronous task coordination. Detail the deployment configurations for different environments, monitoring and logging strategies, and error handling patterns across service boundaries. Include the CI/CD pipeline integration, automated testing strategies, and deployment rollback procedures. Document the API gateway patterns, rate limiting, and service discovery mechanisms.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Creation & Management Workflow
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the complete product creation and management workflow. Detail the product form interface covering story creation with voice transcription integration, multilingual content support, craft specification inputs, pricing configuration with automatic revenue calculations, and inventory setup. Document the artisan product management dashboard showing product listings, status management (draft, active, sold out, archived), bulk operations, and analytics integration. Explain the approval workflow, moderation processes, and quality control measures. Include form validation rules, error handling, user guidance, and the integration between frontend forms and backend product models.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisan Analytics & Dashboard
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for artisan analytics and dashboard functionality. Detail the artisan-specific analytics dashboard showing earnings tracking, order volume metrics, customer acquisition data, and performance indicators. Document the artisan orders view interface for monitoring sales activity, delivery status, and customer feedback. Explain the earnings calculation methodology including total earnings computation, order count tracking, and payout status monitoring. Cover the artisan business insights including popular products, seasonal trends, and geographic distribution of sales. Document the integration with mobile money payout systems and automated transfer mechanisms. Include performance benchmarks, comparison metrics against platform averages, and growth tracking features for artisan success measurement.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payment Analytics & Reporting
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for payment analytics and reporting systems. Detail the payment volume tracking, revenue analytics, and transaction success rate monitoring. Document the payment method performance dashboards, geographic transaction distribution, and customer payment behavior analysis. Explain the real-time payment monitoring alerts, anomaly detection reports, and reconciliation summaries. Include payment forecasting models, seasonal trends analysis, and merchant commission calculations. Document the export capabilities for accounting integration, tax reporting requirements, and financial audit preparation. Address payment KPIs, conversion rate optimization, and payment friction analysis.

wiki_catalogs.name: Database Schema Evolution
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Empindu's database schema evolution and migration strategy. Document the complete migration history showing schema changes, vector embedding implementations, and feature rollouts. Explain the pgvector extension usage for semantic search capabilities and embedding management. Detail the database indexing strategies for performance optimization, search functionality, and query optimization. Include the data model versioning approach, backward compatibility considerations, and rollback procedures. Address the integration between Django ORM models and raw SQL migrations, custom database functions, and trigger implementations. Document the deployment strategy for schema changes and production database updates.

wiki_catalogs.name: Fulfillment Coordination
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for fulfillment coordination between artisans and logistics. Detail the dispatch process, tracking number generation, dispatch photo upload, and integration with DHL Express shipping. Document the artisan confirmation workflow, order preparation requirements, and fulfillment status updates. Explain the coordination between buyer notifications, artisan dashboards, and admin oversight tools. Include shipping address validation, international shipping considerations, and customs documentation requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Gifting System Endpoints
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for gifting system endpoints. Document gift order creation, personalization workflows, and corporate gift management. Detail gift wrapping options, messaging systems, and scheduling endpoints. Document gift card generation, redemption processes, and gift registry functionality. Include endpoints for gift order tracking, status updates, and delivery coordination. Provide examples for personalized gift creation, bulk corporate orders, and gift card transactions. Address gift-specific validation rules, recipient management, and gift-specific payment processing workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Artisans Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Artisans Management system. Document the artisan onboarding workflows, profile management, and verification processes. Explain the artisan listing interface, certification management, and quality assurance controls. Detail the artisan analytics, performance metrics, and compliance monitoring tools. Include the integration with craft tradition databases, portfolio management, and rating systems. Document the artisan communication tools, support workflows, and dispute resolution processes. Address artisan onboarding automation, quality standards enforcement, and community building features.

wiki_catalogs.name: Notification System Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for the Telegram notification system integration within the broader notification ecosystem. Detail the notification triggering mechanisms, message formatting rules, and delivery prioritization. Document the integration with order lifecycle events, payment confirmations, and shipment notifications. Explain the message template system, variable substitution, and dynamic content generation for different notification types. Include the integration with email notifications, SMS alerts, and in-app messaging for omnichannel communication. Document the notification scheduling, batch processing, and retry mechanisms for failed deliveries. Address the notification analytics, delivery tracking, and user preference management. Provide guidelines for customizing notification content and managing notification opt-out preferences.

wiki_catalogs.name: Content Analysis & Moderation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for AI-powered content analysis and moderation capabilities. Document the sentiment analysis algorithms for product reviews and artisan feedback, automated content moderation workflows, and spam detection systems. Explain the integration with review scoring, content categorization, and automated flagging mechanisms. Detail the machine learning models for detecting inappropriate content, review authenticity verification, and community guideline enforcement. Include examples of moderation thresholds, appeal processes, and manual review workflows. Address bias mitigation in content analysis, model retraining procedures, and compliance with content policy requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Supabase Integration & Authentication
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop comprehensive documentation for Supabase integration and authentication system. Detail the Supabase client initialization, authentication flow, and real-time data synchronization. Document the authentication hooks, session management, and user state handling. Explain the database integration patterns, row-level security policies, and data access controls. Include examples of sign-in/sign-up flows, password reset procedures, and social authentication. Address real-time subscriptions, data mutation patterns, and offline synchronization strategies. Document the integration with Next.js App Router, SSR considerations, and performance optimization techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Marketplace Search Interface
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the marketplace search user interface and interaction patterns. Document the search bar implementation, autocomplete functionality, and real-time search suggestions. Explain the product filtering system, category selection, price range sliders, and artisan-specific filters. Detail the search result display components, sorting options, and pagination handling. Include the integration with React Query for search state management, debouncing strategies for search performance, and responsive design considerations. Address accessibility features, keyboard navigation, and mobile-optimized search experiences.

wiki_catalogs.name: Async Processing & Task Queue
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for Empindu's asynchronous processing architecture. Explain the Celery worker configuration, task queue management, and background job patterns. Document the event-driven patterns used for order notifications, payment processing, and gifting workflows. Detail the task serialization, error handling, and retry mechanisms. Include the monitoring and debugging strategies for asynchronous tasks. Explain the integration between Django models and Celery tasks, including task scheduling and periodic jobs. Document performance optimization techniques and scaling considerations for the task queue system.

wiki_catalogs.name: Provider Abstraction Layer
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the payment provider abstraction layer that standardizes payment processing across different methods. Detail the provider interface design, common payment operations, and unified error handling patterns. Document the provider selection logic, fallback mechanisms, and provider-specific configuration management. Explain the payment processor architecture, transaction lifecycle management, and provider switching capabilities. Include the provider registry system, dynamic provider loading, and runtime provider configuration. Document the abstraction benefits for adding new payment providers, maintaining consistency across payment methods, and simplifying frontend integration. Address provider performance monitoring, transaction analytics, and provider health checks.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Integration Patterns
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for data integration patterns between frontend and backend systems. Explain the state synchronization mechanisms between React Query cache and backend data stores. Document the real-time data updates using Supabase realtime subscriptions, WebSocket connections, and event-driven architecture. Detail the conflict resolution strategies for concurrent data modifications, optimistic updates, and offline synchronization patterns. Cover the data transformation pipelines, API response normalization, and caching strategies with Redis integration. Explain the user session management, authentication state synchronization, and role-based data access patterns. Include error handling for network failures, data consistency validation, and graceful degradation strategies. Document the monitoring and debugging tools for data flow analysis and performance optimization.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Model
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive data model documentation for the Product entity representing Empindu's story-first architecture. Detail the complete field definitions including product metadata, story content with multilingual support, provenance tracking, embedding vectors for semantic search, pricing structures, and inventory management. Document the relationship with Artisan models and the cultural IP anchoring through craft tradition connections. Explain the embedding vector system for AI-powered discovery and the semantic search capabilities. Include the product lifecycle from creation to archival, status management, and visibility controls. Address the multilingual content support, image/media handling, and the integration with the recommendation system. Document the product analytics and performance metrics tracking.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Catalog Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the product catalog management system. Explain the story-first product architecture that emphasizes artisan narratives and cultural provenance. Document the product model design including story elements, pricing structures, inventory management, and embedding vectors for semantic search. Detail the product listing process, image and media handling through Cloudinary, and the artisan product management interface. Include product form validation, multilingual content support, and search optimization features. Document the relationship between artisans and their products, provenance record creation, and product analytics. Address product moderation, quality control, and performance optimization for large catalogs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Search Integration & Semantic Discovery
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the semantic search integration and product discovery system. Explain how product embeddings enable intelligent search beyond keyword matching, including the pgvector implementation and dimension configuration. Document the search algorithms that combine semantic similarity with traditional filtering, relevance scoring, and result ranking. Detail the integration between product stories, craft details, and embedding vectors for contextual search results. Cover the search interface implementation, filter options, and performance optimization techniques for large product catalogs. Include the relationship between product detail views and search discoverability, and how the story-first approach enhances search relevance.

wiki_catalogs.name: Return & Refund System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the return and refund processing system. Document the return request workflow, eligibility criteria, and approval processes. Explain the integration between buyer return requests, artisan approvals, and admin oversight. Detail the refund calculation methodology, platform commission adjustments, and artisan earnings recalculations. Include return shipping coordination, item inspection requirements, and automated refund processing. Address dispute resolution, return policy enforcement, and integration with accounting systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication & Authorization
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for API authentication and authorization mechanisms. Document JWT token generation, validation, and refresh workflows. Detail bearer token authentication requirements for protected endpoints, session management, and user role-based access control. Document login/logout endpoints, password reset procedures, and account verification processes. Include examples for frontend integration, token storage, and automatic token refresh. Address security considerations, rate limiting, and protection against common attacks. Provide troubleshooting guidance for authentication failures and token expiration scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Products Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Products Management interface. Document the product listing system, approval workflows, and inventory management tools. Explain the product moderation processes, quality control checks, and compliance verification. Detail the product analytics, sales tracking, and performance monitoring features. Include the integration with artisan profiles, category management, and search optimization. Document the product modification capabilities, bulk operations, and automated workflows. Address product search and filtering, spam detection, and content moderation tools.

wiki_catalogs.name: Build System & Deployment Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for Empindu's build system and deployment configuration. Document the Vite configuration, TypeScript compilation settings, and PostCSS processing pipeline. Explain the ESLint configuration, code quality tools, and development workflow. Detail the Tailwind CSS integration, utility classes usage, and custom styling patterns. Include examples of environment variable handling, build optimization, and asset management. Address the deployment preparation, static site generation considerations, and performance optimization techniques. Document the development server configuration, hot module replacement, and debugging setup.

wiki_catalogs.name: Configuration & Environment Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed configuration management documentation for Empindu's Django settings architecture. Document the multi-environment configuration strategy with base, development, and production settings. Explain the environment variable usage, secret management, and configuration validation patterns. Detail the URL routing configuration, WSGI application setup, and middleware stack configuration. Include the static file handling, media file management, and cache configuration strategies. Document the deployment-specific configurations and environment-specific optimizations. Explain the configuration inheritance patterns and how settings are loaded and validated.

wiki_catalogs.name: Order Model
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Order model that manages the complete purchase lifecycle. Document the extensive field definitions covering order states, payment processing, fulfillment tracking, and return/refund management. Detail the 8-state order lifecycle with frozen financial snapshots, artisan payout calculations, and status transitions. Explain the relationship with Product and Artisan models, payment integration, and shipping logistics. Include the order timeline tracking, customer communication triggers, and administrative workflow automation. Document the return request system, refund processing, and dispute resolution mechanisms. Address the order analytics, sales tracking, and performance metrics. Explain the integration with payment providers, notification systems, and inventory management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Order Processing System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the order processing system. Detail the complete order lifecycle from creation through fulfillment, including the 8-state payment workflow and order status management. Document the checkout process, payment state transitions, and fulfillment coordination between artisans and logistics. Explain the order model architecture, frozen financial snapshots, and audit trail capabilities. Include order tracking for buyers, artisan order management dashboards, and admin oversight tools. Document return and refund processing, order timeline visualization, and automated notification system. Address order analytics, performance monitoring, and integration with DHL Express shipping.

wiki_catalogs.name: Order Analytics & Monitoring
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for order analytics and monitoring capabilities. Detail the order metrics tracking, performance indicators, and business intelligence dashboards. Document the integration between order data collection, real-time analytics, and administrative reporting tools. Explain the order volume tracking, conversion rate analysis, and customer lifetime value calculations. Include monitoring alerts, performance benchmarks, and integration with business intelligence platforms. Address data privacy considerations, reporting automation, and export capabilities.

wiki_catalogs.name: Error Handling & Response Formats
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for API error handling and response formatting standards. Document standardized error response schemas, HTTP status code usage, and validation error formats. Detail common error categories including authentication failures, validation errors, business rule violations, and system errors. Include examples of structured error responses, localization support, and debugging information. Document rate limiting responses, API versioning errors, and deprecation notices. Provide guidance for client-side error handling, retry mechanisms, and graceful degradation strategies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Corporate Gifting Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Corporate Gifting Management system. Document the corporate gift order processing, approval workflows, and scheduling tools. Explain the bulk ordering capabilities, custom gift configurations, and corporate account management. Detail the gift order tracking, timeline visualization, and delivery coordination features. Include the integration with corporate portals, budget management, and reporting systems. Document the gift customization options, branding capabilities, and compliance controls.
